report_name: Anthropic's Project Glasswing Uses New AI to Find Thousands of Critical Flaws

tools.name: Claude Mythos
tools.description: A frontier AI model from Anthropic specialized in code analysis and proactive vulnerability discovery. It is the core technology in Project Glasswing and is noted for its ability to find complex logical flaws beyond the scope of traditional SAST tools. The project acknowledges the dual-use nature of this technology.

tools.name: Static Application Security Testing (SAST)
tools.description: Traditional Static Application Security Testing (SAST) tools are mentioned for comparison, as they rely on predefined rules and patterns, which the Claude Mythos AI model is said to surpass by having a deeper, contextual understanding of code.

vulnerabilities.name: FFmpeg library vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: A 16-year-old vulnerability in the widely used FFmpeg video-encoding library that had been missed by decades of human review and automated scanning, discovered by the Claude Mythos AI model.

vulnerabilities.name: Remote crash vulnerability in major operating systems
vulnerabilities.description: A flaw discovered by Claude Mythos that could allow a remote attacker to crash any machine running a major operating system simply by connecting to it.

vulnerabilities.name: Linux kernel privilege escalation chain
vulnerabilities.description: A chain of exploits in the Linux Kernel discovered by the Claude Mythos AI model that allowed for full privilege escalation.

campaigns.name: Project Glasswing
campaigns.description: A landmark cybersecurity initiative by Anthropic and a consortium of tech companies to proactively discover and remediate security vulnerabilities in critical software using the Claude Mythos AI model.
campaigns.objective: Proactively discover and remediate security vulnerabilities in critical software to harden the global software supply chain.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: An AI safety and research company that launched Project Glasswing and developed the Claude Mythos AI model for vulnerability discovery.

identities.name: Google
identities.description: A member of the Project Glasswing consortium, using the Claude Mythos AI to audit its own codebases and critical dependencies.
